title: Colossus
content:
{{MarvelLegacy|Fox|[[Earth-10005]]|4=Characters|6=the 20th Century Fox Movies}} {{Character |image = Colossus.png |real name = {{Conjecture|Piotr Nikolaievitch Rasputin (Пётр Николаевич Распутин)}}{{Ref|ConjecCode}} |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Colossus{{Ref|DW}}}} |species = [[Mutant]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USSR}} (formerly)
{{Citizenship|RUS}} |gender = Male |affiliation = {{Affiliation|X2E10005}} |movie = ''[[Deadpool & Wolverine]]'' |actor = [[Stefan Kapičić]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|You watching anything good?"
"{{WPS|The Great British Bake Off|Great British Bake Off}}.|[[Wade Wilson]] and Colossus|Deadpool & Wolverine}} '''{{Conjecture|Piotr Nikolaievitch Rasputin}}''' (Russian: '''{{Conjecture|Пётр Николаевич Распутин}}''') is a member of the [[X-Men/Earth-10005|X-Men]], known as '''Colossus'''. ==Biography== {{MD|Peter Rasputin (Earth-10005 Revised)||1}} ===Wade Wilson's Friend=== {{Quote|Where was I?"
"The adventure of life.|[[Wade Wilson]] and Colossus|Deadpool & Wolverine}} Colossus was born a [[mutant]] with the ability to turn his entire body into steel and later joined the [[X-Men/Earth-10005|X-Men]]. Colossus mentored a young mutant known as [[Negasonic Teenage Warhead]]. The two assisted [[Deadpool]] with rescuing his [[Vanessa Carlysle|girlfriend]]. Colossus would try to recruit Deadpool into the X-Men, but it failed. Colossus still remained friends with Deadpool. In [[2020s/Earth-10005#2024|2024]], Colossus was invited to Wilson's surprise birthday party at his [[Wade Wilson's Apartment|apartment]], along with fellow X-Men Negasonic and [[Yukio]], as well as the rest of Wilson's friends. Having surprised Wilson when he returned home, all the guests mingled with each other. Colossus spoke with Wilson, who asked the former if he was watching anything, to which Colossus replied with ''{{WPS|The Great British Bake Off}}''. All the guests listened to Wilson make a speech about how grateful he was to have them in his life. A few days later, they all got together again for dinner, where they were joined by [[Logan]] and [[Laura]].{{Ref|DW}} ==Powers== *'''Mutant Physiology''': Piotr Rasputin is a mutant who possesses a steel-made body to protect himself. **'''Metal Mimicry''': Colossus can transform his body into this armor-like state at will. ==Relationships== ===Allies=== *[[X-Men/Earth-10005|X-Men]] - Teammates and Friends **[[Negasonic Teenage Warhead|Ellie Phimister/Negasonic Teenage Warhead]] **[[Yukio]] *[[Deadpool|Wade Wilson/Deadpool]] - Friend *[[Dopinder]] *[[Blind Al]] *[[Peter Wisdom]] *[[Vanessa Carlysle]] *[[Shatterstar|Rusty/Shatterstar]] *[[Buck]] *[[Wolverine|Logan/Wolverine]] *[[X-23|X-23/Laura]] *[[Dogpool|Mary Puppins/Dogpool]] ==Trivia== *In the comics, Piotr Rasputin is a [[mutant]] who has the power to transform his entire body into an organic steel form, and he serves as a member of the [[X-Men]]. *In {{WPS|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, Colossus is an [[X-Men|X-Man]] who tries to bring out the good in [[Deadpool]], only to fail many times. However, he still cares for Wilson and often helps him in his battles against {{WPS|Angel Dust (comics)|Angel Dust}}, [[Ajax]], and [[Juggernaut]]. *Colossus is listed as one of the default names on ''[[The Avengers: Skrull Takedown]]'''s high score screen. ==Behind the Scenes== *Colossus in the [[Marvel Cinematic Universe]] continues the live-action incarnation of the character from {{WPS|20th Century Fox}}'s {{WPS|X-Men (film series)|''X-Men'' film series}}, who was voiced by [[Stefan Kapičić]] and portrayed by {{WPS|Andre Tricoteux}}, replacing [[Daniel Cudmore]] who played the character in ''{{WPS|X2 (film)|X2}}'', ''{{WPS|X-Men: The Last Stand}}'' and ''{{WPS|X-Men: Days of Future Past}}''. ==Gallery== Colossus Party.png Deadpool & Wolverine Teaser Trailer (8).png Deadpool & Wolverine Teaser Trailer (1).png Deadpool & Wolverine Teaser Trailer (3).png Deadpool & Wolverine Trailer (60).png Wade's World.png Deadpool & Wolverine - CCXP Poster.jpg Deadpool & Wolverine IMAX Poster 3.jpg ==References== {{reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{Marvel|Peter Rasputin (Earth-10005 Revised)}} *{{WP|Colossus (character)|Colossus}} [[es:Piotr Rasputin]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:Deadpool & Wolverine Characters]] [[Category:Mutants]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Black Hair]] [[Category:Gray Eyes]] [[Category:X-Men Members/Earth-10005]]
